expectedVerification: one shared verification setup; the controller verifies each outcome separately
commitExpectation: one controller commit after every outcome is verified separately
forbidden: batching outcomes that share only a file but not a responsibility
accepting the batch without verifying each outcome separately
stop_condition: one cost-oriented-agentic-workflow:cow-implementer handles a tightly-coupled batch whose brief preserves OUTCOME_1/OUTCOME_2; the controller verifies each before one commit
human_checks: confirm exactly one implementer for the batch
confirm the brief preserves each outcome with its own acceptance
confirm each outcome was verified separately
